results.title: 10 moments from Mosswood Meltdown's wild punk picnic with Iggy Pop and Bikini Kill
results.description: The 17th annual fest at Mosswood Park in Oakland was a punk picnic paradise featuring sets from Iggy Pop, Bikini Kill and Pavement.

results.title: 'La La Land's 10th Anniversary Poster Fixes Ryan Gosling's Hand That Haunted Him
results.description: Ryan Gosling can sleep easier now knowing that the La La Land poster has been fixed from his 'La La Hand.'

results.title: Pearl Thriller Releases on Hulu Next Week
results.description: A hit thriller that mashes up classic films The Wizard of Oz and Texas Chain Saw Massacre is releasing on Hulu next week.

results.title: Plas Johnson, jazz artist and 'Pink Panther' saxophonist, dies at 94
results.description: 'My solos always seemed to bring the record up another notch,' Johnson said in one interview. He played with Frank Sinatra and Marvin Gaye.

results.title: Animated Fantasy Series: From Castlevania to Dragon Ball Z
results.description: Exploration of groundbreaking animated fantasy series including Castlevania, Arcane, She-Ra and the Princesses of Power, Hunter x Hunter, and Dragon Ball Z, analyzing their worldbuilding, adaptations from video games, and cultural impact.
